How do I ready a guinea pig cage for it's new occupants?

A. Provide the guinea pig with a cage full of a few inches of bedding made of ripped paper strips, you will also need to supply it with a water bottle and a food dish.
B. Provide the guinea pig with a cage full of a few inches of bedding made of ripped jeans material, you will also need to supply it with a water bottle and a food dish.

Decide which option is more reasonable. Keep the reasoning brief and end with only one uppercase letter on the last line: A or B.

option_map.A: Provide the guinea pig with a cage full of a few inches of bedding made of ripped paper strips, you will also need to supply it with a water bottle and a food dish.
option_map.B: Provide the guinea pig with a cage full of a few inches of bedding made of ripped jeans material, you will also need to supply it with a water bottle and a food dish.

Recycle a spray bottle for a new cleaner.

A. Open the top of the empty spray bottle and check for damage. Rinse the bottle then fill halfway with warm water. Replace the spray nozzle and pump a few times to clear the hose. Empty sparrow bottle and allow to dry before using with a new cleaner.
B. Open the top of the empty spray bottle and check for damage. Rinse the bottle then fill halfway with warm water. Replace the spray nozzle and pump a few times to clear the hose. Empty spray bottle and allow to dry before using with a new cleaner.

Decide which option is more reasonable. Keep the reasoning brief and end with only one uppercase letter on the last line: A or B.

How do you attach toilet paper to a glass jar?

A. Press a piece of double-sided tape to the glass jar and then press the toilet paper onto the tape.
B. Spread mayonnaise all over the jar with your palms and then roll the jar in toilet paper.

Decide which option is more reasonable. Keep the reasoning brief and end with only one uppercase letter on the last line: A or B.

option_map.A: Press a piece of double-sided tape to the glass jar and then press the toilet paper onto the tape.
option_map.B: Spread mayonnaise all over the jar with your palms and then roll the jar in toilet paper.

How to make tissue paper window decorations?

A. Find tissue paper and fold it in half. Take scissors and cut out pieces of the paper in the middle. When you are done tape it to your window.
B. Find tissue paper and fold it in half. Take scissors and tear out pieces of the paper in the middle. When you are done tape it to your window.

Decide which option is more reasonable. Keep the reasoning brief and end with only one uppercase letter on the last line: A or B.

option_map.A: Find tissue paper and fold it in half. Take scissors and cut out pieces of the paper in the middle. When you are done tape it to your window.
option_map.B: Find tissue paper and fold it in half. Take scissors and tear out pieces of the paper in the middle. When you are done tape it to your window.
